outlets.name: CNN
outlets.headline: Live updates: Iran war news as Tehran rejects temporary ceasefire, Trump sets deadline for Strait of Hormuz
outlets.summary: Comprehensive liveblog coverage of Day 38: Trump threatens total destruction, Araghchi refuses talks, ceasefire rejected.

outlets.name: NPR
outlets.headline: Iran pushes back against Trump's deadline to open the Strait of Hormuz
outlets.summary: Iran's presidential spokesperson calls Trump threats "sheer desperation." Hormuz opens only with compensation regime.

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: Trump: Iran offer 'significant' but 'not good enough'; it's refusing to 'cry uncle'
outlets.summary: Trump characterizes Iran's 10-point counterproposal as progress but insufficient. Sets Tuesday deadline.

outlets.name: RedState
outlets.headline: Trump Says Iran's Peace Proposals 'Not Good Enough,' Sets Deadline on When US Will Intensify Attacks
outlets.summary: Coverage of Trump's press conference and Tuesday escalation timeline.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: Iran war live: Tehran says response to ceasefire proposals formulated
outlets.summary: Comprehensive liveblog. Iran formulating response to 45-day ceasefire. Trump deadline looms.

outlets.name: Euronews
outlets.headline: Tehran and Trump trade threats amid renewed Iran war ceasefire proposal push
outlets.summary: Diplomatic efforts intensify as both sides harden positions ahead of Tuesday deadline.

outlets.name: Times of Israel
outlets.headline: Israel kills Islamic Guards intel chief, bombs largest Iranian petrochemical plant
outlets.summary: IDF confirms elimination of IRGC intelligence chief Khademi and destruction of South Pars facility.

outlets.name: Haaretz
outlets.headline: Waves of Iranian Cluster Missiles Hit Dozens of Locations Across Tel Aviv Area
outlets.summary: Israel doubts US-Iran talks will succeed. Preparing extensive attack if deadline passes without deal.

outlets.name: PressTV
outlets.headline: US-Israeli attack targets Iran's Sharif University of Technology, causing damage
outlets.summary: Iran condemns strike on prestigious academic institution. First VP accuses US of using bunker-buster bomb.

outlets.name: PressTV
outlets.headline: Iran blasts EU over hypocritical Strait of Hormuz stance
outlets.summary: Iran criticizes EU for invoking international law on Hormuz while ignoring violations in strikes on Iran.
